# Purpose
The code is a C++ header file named `mfg_vibe_app.h`. It declares a function `mfg_vibe_app_get_info` that returns a pointer to a `PebbleProcessMd` object. The file includes a reference to another header file, `pebble_process_md.h`, which is likely part of a process management module. The purpose of this header is to provide an interface for a test application that performs a simple operation of "vibing" five times before terminating. The header file is intended to be included in other C++ source files that require access to the `mfg_vibe_app_get_info` function.
